mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admission_list (exam_id, admitted_major, final_first_score, final_second_score, total_score) VALUES (#{examId}, #{admittedMajor}, #{finalFirstScore}, #{finalSecondScore}, #{totalScore})
mapper.select: SELECT m.major_name AS majorName, COUNT(a.exam_id) AS count FROM admission_list a LEFT JOIN major_dict m ON a.admitted_major = m.major_code GROUP BY a.admitted_major, m.major_name
SELECT p.origin AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM admission_list a LEFT JOIN candidate_profile p ON a.exam_id = p.exam_id GROUP BY p.origin
SELECT p.education AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM admission_list a LEFT JOIN candidate_profile p ON a.exam_id = p.exam_id GROUP BY p.education

SELECT m.major_name AS majorName, m.planned_inside AS plannedInside, m.planned_outside AS plannedOutside, m.planned_inside + m.planned_outside AS totalPlanned, COUNT(a.exam_id) AS actualCount FROM major_dict m LEFT JOIN admission_list a ON m.major_code = a.admitted_major GROUP BY m.major_code, m.major_name, m.planned_inside, m.planned_outside
